answers: Eco-tourism: responsible travel to natural areas. Minimal impact, supports conservation and local communities.
Planning for eco tourism in advance ensures a better experience.
Eco Tourism can be an amazing experience. Research and prepare before you go.
Tips for eco tourism: plan ahead, budget wisely, be flexible, and enjoy the journey!
